extraction.ocr_text:
Create New

Start building
Choose how you’d like to begin

Agentic Process
Orchestrate end-to-end processes with AI agents, robots and people.

Agent
AI powered digital worker leveraging LLMs, context, and automation tools to accomplish its goal.

RPA Workflow
Automate repetitive tasks using robotic process automation.

App
Create low-code apps for data manipulation, decision approval, and process control.
extraction.description: This screenshot shows UiPath Studio Web with the Create New menu opened as a modal titled Start building. The modal lists available project/component types, and the Agent option is visually highlighted, indicating the lesson step to create a new agent solution from Studio Web.
extraction.step_instructions:
1. Click on the Create New button in the top-right corner of Studio Web.
2. In the Start building dialog, click on Agent.
3. Proceed to create a new Agent Solution from the selected Agent option.
